rulings.Case Title: DAVID YANG et al VS. FOLSOM/ FIRST LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, April 8, 2010, line 3, CROSS DEFENDANT THE METROPOLITAN ASSOCIATION, DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT. Demurrer overruled, ten days leave to answer. rulings.Case Title: HEIDI NELKIE VS. URS CORPORATION A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, April 8, 2010, line 6, PLAINTIFF HEIDI NELKIE DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer overruled as to 1st and 2nd affirmative defenses. rulings.Case Title: IN RE: IN THE MATTER OF 150 POWELL STREET HOMEOWNERS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Amendment To Declaration Of Covenants, Conditions And Restrictions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, April 8, 2010, line 10, Petition for Amendment to Declaration of Covenants, Conditions and Restrictions. Petition denied without prejudice. Amendment One is not unconstitutional or discriminatory, and does not violate the Civil Rights Act or Fair Employment Act. Petitioner was not a party to respondent's purchase agreement and is not bound by its terms. Respondent has not established that the amendment would impair any special rights, preferences, or privileges designated in the declaration as belonging to the declarant. However, petitioner has not met its burden to show the proposed amendments are reasonable CC section 1356(c)(5). =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ANNIE GLASS VS. INAM CHADHOURY et al

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, April 8, 2010, line 9, DEFENDANT INAM CHOUDHARY MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Off Calendar, motion served 3/31/2010 and no Order Shortening Time. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: BEATRICE C. WALKER VS. DIANNA J. JOHNSON et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, April 8, 2010, line 8, DEFENDANT DIANNA JOHNSON DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained with 5 days leave to amend to allege facts to support timing of delinquent amounts listed in the notice. Ambiguity exists between delinquent amounts due on the 5th of each month and the allegation that the rents are due on the 15th day of each month. =(302/CWW)
